headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 13, 2026**
article:
The San Francisco Giants fell to the Baltimore Orioles 6-2, with Casey Schmitt leading the Giants' offense with a 3-hit performance, including a home run. The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow win over the Philadelphia Phillies 4-3, with Taylor Clarke earning the win and Paul Sewald securing the save. Trea Turner led the offense with a strong performance, recording 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs.

Several key players have been placed on the injured list, including Tyler O'Neill of the Baltimore Orioles, who has been placed on the 7-day injured list due to a concussion. Hunter Harvey of the Chicago Cubs has been placed on the 15-day injured list with right triceps inflammation. George Springer of the Toronto Blue Jays has been placed on the 10-day injured list with a left great toe fracture.

The Philadelphia Phillies have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Steward Berroa from the Milwaukee Brewers in exchange for cash. The St. Louis Cardinals have traded LHP Nick Raquet to the Baltimore Orioles for 2B Brayden Smith.

top_news.title: **Giants Fall to Orioles in 6-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles took down the San Francisco Giants 6-2, securing a decisive victory. Casey Schmitt led the Giants' offense with a 3-hit performance, including a home run.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Edge Phillies in Thrilling 4-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow win over the Philadelphia Phillies, with Taylor Clarke earning the win and Paul Sewald securing the save. Trea Turner led the offense with a strong performance, recording 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays 8-2**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins secured an 8-2 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, led by Tristan Gray's standout performance at the plate. Gray hit a home run and drove in three runs, while Taj Bradley pitched 5 strong innings with 7 strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Angels Take Down Reds 9-6**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels secured a 9-6 victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with José Soriano earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 10 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. Elly De La Cruz led the Reds' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **O'Neill Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles right fielder Tyler O'Neill has been placed on the 7-day injured list due to a concussion, effective retroactive to April 9, 2026.

top_news.title: **Phillies Acquire Steward Berroa in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Steward Berroa from the Milwaukee Brewers in exchange for cash.
